title: Implement cultural burning practices on Country
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement cultural burning practices on Country demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan burn activities

pcs.text: Develop working relationships with local Community to support the planning and implementation of traditional cultural burning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop working relationships with local Community to support the planning and implementation of traditional cultural burning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop working relationships with local Community to support the planning and implementation of traditional cultural burning.

pcs.text: Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities and obtain approval to be on Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities and obtain approval to be on Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consult appropriate Cultural Authorities and obtain approval to be on Country.

pcs.text: Obtain and record cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holder or local Community members
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and record cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holder or local Community members?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and record cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holder or local Community members.

pcs.text: Identify and record ceremonial requirements for fire practices necessary for inclusion in burn plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record ceremonial requirements for fire practices necessary for inclusion in burn plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record ceremonial requirements for fire practices necessary for inclusion in burn plan.

pcs.text: Develop a burning plan and schedule for the target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a burning plan and schedule for the target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a burning plan and schedule for the target area.

pcs.text: Advise local fire services and agencies of proposed burn plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise local fire services and agencies of proposed burn plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise local fire services and agencies of proposed burn plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan burn activities

elements.title: Protect life and property and conserve fauna and flora species in burn area

pcs.text: Implement burn according to cultural burning techniques consistent with the burn plan and schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement burn according to cultural burning techniques consistent with the burn plan and schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement burn according to cultural burning techniques consistent with the burn plan and schedule.

pcs.text: Exclude visitors from target areas, entertainment areas and areas possibly affected by smoke or risk from escaping fire
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Exclude visitors from target areas, entertainment areas and areas possibly affected by smoke or risk from escaping fire?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Exclude visitors from target areas, entertainment areas and areas possibly affected by smoke or risk from escaping fire.

pcs.text: Advise neighbours and agencies of the intention to burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise neighbours and agencies of the intention to burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise neighbours and agencies of the intention to burn.

pcs.text: Protect cultural sites, assets and entertainment areas according to cultural protocols and fire industry practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect cultural sites, assets and entertainment areas according to cultural protocols and fire industry practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect cultural sites, assets and entertainment areas according to cultural protocols and fire industry practices.

pcs.text: Apply fire breaks to the area to maintain control of the fire and burn intensity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fire breaks to the area to maintain control of the fire and burn intensity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fire breaks to the area to maintain control of the fire and burn intensity.

pcs.text: Remove animals in danger in the burn area before starting the controlled cultural burn, where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove animals in danger in the burn area before starting the controlled cultural burn, where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove animals in danger in the burn area before starting the controlled cultural burn, where possible.

pcs.text: Assess flora for impact on fire-sensitive communities and species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess flora for impact on fire-sensitive communities and species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess flora for impact on fire-sensitive communities and species.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Protect life and property and conserve fauna and flora species in burn area

elements.title: Burn defined areas

pcs.text: Assess weather forecasts and current weather conditions to determine appropriate conditions and timing for burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess weather forecasts and current weather conditions to determine appropriate conditions and timing for burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess weather forecasts and current weather conditions to determine appropriate conditions and timing for burn.

pcs.text: Use appropriate personal protective equipment and follow work health and safety policies and procedures during the burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate personal protective equipment and follow work health and safety policies and procedures during the burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate personal protective equipment and follow work health and safety policies and procedures during the burn.

pcs.text: Use appropriate ignition techniques, patterns, fire control and safety procedures to conduct the burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate ignition techniques, patterns, fire control and safety procedures to conduct the burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate ignition techniques, patterns, fire control and safety procedures to conduct the burn.

pcs.text: Identify targeted areas defined by burn specification or limiting factors and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify targeted areas defined by burn specification or limiting factors and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify targeted areas defined by burn specification or limiting factors and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Apply fire to targeted areas according to cultural burning techniques, traditional frequency and organisation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fire to targeted areas according to cultural burning techniques, traditional frequency and organisation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fire to targeted areas according to cultural burning techniques, traditional frequency and organisation requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain radio communication with other workers in the area throughout the burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain radio communication with other workers in the area throughout the burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain radio communication with other workers in the area throughout the burn.

pcs.text: Check area to ensure all sections have received required burn in accordance with the burning plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check area to ensure all sections have received required burn in accordance with the burning plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check area to ensure all sections have received required burn in accordance with the burning plan.

pcs.text: Complete and record assessment of burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and record assessment of burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and record assessment of burn.

pcs.text: Monitor burning area to avoid wildfire outbreaks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor burning area to avoid wildfire outbreaks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor burning area to avoid wildfire outbreaks.

pcs.text: Assess seasonal conditions and life cycles of flora and fauna for the end of fire practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess seasonal conditions and life cycles of flora and fauna for the end of fire practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess seasonal conditions and life cycles of flora and fauna for the end of fire practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Burn defined areas

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
